query:
-- Verificar contagem de registros em cada tabela
SELECT 'users' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM users
UNION ALL
SELECT 'escalas', COUNT(*) FROM escalas
UNION ALL
SELECT 'participantesEscala', COUNT(*) FROM participantesEscala
UNION ALL
SELECT 'repertorios', COUNT(*) FROM repertorios
UNION ALL
SELECT 'musicasFavoritas', COUNT(*) FROM musicasFavoritas
UNION ALL
SELECT 'historicoMusicasBase', COUNT(*) FROM historicoMusicasBase
UNION ALL
SELECT 'auditLogs', COUNT(*) FROM auditLogs;
